/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libauv_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/auv_interfaces/libauv_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/auv_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/auv_interfaces/msg/_bot_pose_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/ros_workspace/src/build/auv_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libauv_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libauv_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
